description: Snapshot of CSP meta tag content for pages excluded from global propagation (SKIP_DIRS + SKIP_FILES). Run 'node scripts/propagate-csp.mjs --check-skipped' to detect CSP drift on these pages.

vaultsparked/index.html.reason: SKIP_DIRS — page-specific CSP managed directly. Externalized all inline scripts (S60). CSP currently matches canonical but is managed separately in case of future page-specific additions.
